entities.name: Coordination Workflow
entities.context: Framework for parallel task execution with dependency management, achieving ~100min vs 120+ sequential

entities.name: Coordinator
entities.context: Role that reviews worker outputs, approves completions, and integrates results

entities.name: W1
entities.context: First worker in parallel pattern, has no dependencies, starts immediately

entities.name: W2
entities.context: Second worker, blocked until W1 completes and is approved

entities.name: W3
entities.context: Third worker, requires both W1 and W2 completion before starting

relationships.context: W2 depends on W1 completion before it can start
Coordinator reviews and approves W1 output
Coordinator reviews and approves W2 output
Coordinator reviews and approves W3 output
Coordinator is central role in the coordination workflow pattern
